titleStmt.title: SII 38.467: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 467. (A.R. No. 467 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north wall, maṇḍapa infront of the central shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakaravartti Rājarāja III Year 12: Tulā, śu. di. 7 Monday Uttirāḍam = 18th October 1227 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the accountant of the village Chōḻaṉmāruttinallūrkkaṭṭaḷai, Arivalam-uḍaiyāṉ received an order from the annual committee (Samvatsaravāriyam) of Śrīsuddhavallich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēyam in Puṟaṅgarambaināḍu in Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, which is stated to have commenced its functions from the month of Kaṟkaṭaka (June-July).

The temple which is located at Tiruttuṟaippūṇḍi, it is said, was bereft of water tank. Kōṭṭūr-uḍaiyāṉ Kūttāṇḍāṉ, a merchant of Kullōttuṅgachōḻa-paṭṭiṇam bought a piece of land 1 mā and 1 mundrikai at Chōḻaṉmārutinallūr, got it tax free and excavated a tank. This land was classified under virivu category. Further the inscription mentions that there was no shelter for the god (when he was pleased to appear and bless) after his ablultion (in the tank), the same merchant bought two more pieces of land, three and half-a-mā in extent at Chōḻaṉmāruttāṇḍānallūr and granted to the temple as tirunāmattukkāṇi. It is further stated that this land was adjacent to the said tank as its surface was uneven. The merchant levelled the ground and the tāṉattār petitioned that this land be declared as tax-free under the classification of maḍakku. The classification of lands under various categories and exemption of taxes were also duly entered into the tax-register in the twelfth regnal year of the king (1228 A.D.). Further on the orders of the sabhā the tax, vēḷāṉveṭṭi was removed from the temple account and added to the liability of the sabhā. Taxes like kuḍimai and viṉiyōgam were waived. Besides this, the temple authorities were permitted to plant coconut trees on the bank of the water-tank, wherein the maṇḍapa was situated.
The accountant of the ūr, Arivalam-uḍaiyāṉ, Soṭṭai Agnīśan Bhaṭṭaṉ, Kuruvaśēri Suriyadēva Bhaṭṭaṉ and many others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉacakkaravatti
kaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟkku yāṇṭu
12 tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu
saptamiyum tiṅkaḷkkiḻamaiyu
m peṟṟa Uttirāṭattunāḷ
rājeṉtiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu
puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu brahmade
yam śrīcuttavalliccaturvve
dimaṅka(ka)lattu kaṟkkaṭakanā
yaṟṟu mutal samvaṟsaram grāma
kāriyam cekiṟak kūṭṭap
perumakkaḷ Eḻuttu nammurppi
ṭākai makaṉaṟaikkāvāṉ co
ḻaṉ mārutinallūrkkaṭṭaḷai
kaṇakku Arivalamuṭaiyāṉ ka
ṇṭu Uṭaiyār tiruttuṟaip
pūṇṭi Uṭaiyārkku Ūrilt
tittakkuḷam Iṉṟi kemiḻi
kkuppaṭṭu varukaiyāle tit
tak kuḷamākac coḻaṉmāruti
nallūrile tirunāmattukkā
ṇiyāka vilaikoṇṭu kuḷam
kallimuṉpe yiṟaiyiliyā
ka niyokam Eḻutikkuṭuttu yi
ṟaiyiliyāy varukiṟa nilam co
ḻakulacuṉta(e)rivatikkuk kiḻa
kku vimaḷatevavāykkāluk
ku vaṭakku nālāṅkaṇṇāṟ
ṟu Aiñcām tuṇṭattu te
ṉ meṟkkaṭaiya
nilam+mā[�] (1/2) nila
m Oru mā muntirikai
yum tittakuḷamāy va
rukiṟamaiyil It
tāl Em virivu
poṉamaiyālum I
ṅkeeḻuntaruḷi Iru
ntu tirttampiracā
tikka tirumaṇṭapam
ceyya veṇṭu
kaiyālum Itti
rtta kuḷam kalli vi
tta kulottuṅka
coḻappaṭṭaṉattu
viyāpāri koṭṭur
Uṭaiyāṉ kūttā
ṇṭāṉ tirunāma
ttukāṇiyāka vi
lai koṇṭu vi
ṭṭa tirttakkuḷat
tukku kiḻakku muḷḷi
vāy Āṟṟukku me
ṟkku » ç.ba » � 6
(1/2) nilam Araik
kāṇi kiḻ mummāva
raiy Itaṉ talaimā
ṭṭil Āṟṟuvāy
ppaṭukaiyil » 1araikkāl
� (1/2)yum (1/2) nilam mun
tirikai kiḻaraiyum
Āka nilam Araimā A
raikkāṇi muntirikai
kiḻaraiye mummā
varaiyum kuḷamāka kalli tan
tum maṇṭapattukku tūrtta
teṉṟum Innilam Iṟaiyi
liyākap peṟaveṇumeṉ
ṟu tāṉattār vantu coṉṉa
maiyil Innilam Araimā A
raikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ Arai
ye mummāvaraiyum 10 2ṭa
mutal Iṟaiyiliyā nirkkavum
(1/2) nilattāl tarappaṭi maṭakku
nilam muntirikai kiḻ Iraṇṭu
māviṉ kiḻ muṉṟu mā Araikkā
ṇiyum Ivūrille paṉṉira
ṇṭāvatu Eḻutiṉa Iṟaiyili
yil tuvattu viṭṭum Iṟaiyi
lil Ūrtukaiyil Uṭaṉ kūṭṭi
pervaḻi kaṭamaikku Iṟuttu varuki
ṟa nilattu maṭakkile Imaṭakkuk
kākkavum (1/2)nilam Araimā Arai
kkaāṇi muntirikai kiḻ Araiye
mummāvaraiyum 10 2 nāḷ mutal yi
ṟaiyiliyāka Oḻukilum po
ttakatti(l)lum niṟutti cantirātitta
varaiyum Iṟaiyiliyāka nikka
vum (1/2)nilattāl maṭakku veḷā
ṉ veṭṭi tevaiyum Iṟaiyi
liyāka varikoṇṭum kaṭamai
yum viṉiyokaṅkaḷum tavi
rkka kaṭavatākavum I
taṉ talaimāṭṭil Ā
ṟṟaṅkulaiyum pākā
ciriyammāka �ka
k kaṭavarkaḷākavum
Iṅku Āka kalām te
ṅku Uḷiṭṭa maraṅ
kaḷ Ākki koḷḷa kaṭa
vatākavum Ippākā
ciriyamāka nokku
kiṟa Āṟṟaṅkulai para
ppu Uṇṭāy Iruk
kaiyālleṉama
ṭakku maṟṟu Oru Iṭat
tu Āṟṟaṅkaraikku (1/2)kāl
Aṟai Iṭakaṭavatallā
tutākavum coṉ
ṉom Ippaṭi ceyya
paṇṇu paṇiyā
l Ūrkaṇakku Ariva
lam Uṭaiyaāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai
y Irāyur coṭ
ṭai Agnicanpaṭṭaṉ

ppaṭikku Ivai kurava
ce(la)ri cūriyatevapa
ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉ
ṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai
kuravaceri ceṭṭai
yapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai
kuṇṭur Iḷaiyatiruve
ṇkāṭupaṭṭaṉ Eḻut
tu Ippaṭikku Ivai
Aupuṟai jāta
vetapaṭṭaṉeṉ Eḻut
tu Ippaṭikku Ivai
Irāyur coṭṭai
poṟkumārapaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai vaṅkippuṟattu kalavai
nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu I
ppaṭikku Ivai ceṉtiṟattu
śrī kraṣṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur ciṅkapirāṉ
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
kuṇṭur Iḷai cimātavapaṭṭaṉ Eḻut
tu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūr
coṭṭai ceṉṉiyapaṭṭaṉ Eḻut
tu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur ti
ruciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku Ivai kuṇṭur cimātevapaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kurava
ceri ceṉṉiyapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik
ku Ivai tirukkaḻumalattu parañ
coti Irāmatevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭikku Ivai Irāyūr coṭṭai ve
ṇṇai kūttapaṭṭaṉ makaṉ Atticaṉ
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
Irāyūr coṭṭai muttacimātu
tevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku I
vai kuṇṭur pavutturoṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuravaceri Iḷaiya
tiruppoṟṟipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai viravalli ceṭṭayapaṭṭaṉ Eḻut
tu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṟṟalūr cirāmapaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṅki puṟa
ttu pālaaṭaiyāṉ
Eḷḷu mutti cirāmapaṭṭa
ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik
ku Ivai vaṟṟalūr Amu
ta ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku Ivai kuravaceri ce
ṭṭayaṉ tiruppoṟṟi pa
ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭik
ku Ivai vaṅkipuṟattu
pālaṭāyaṉ cirāmapaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku I
vai sabhāpati tiruveṇ
kāṭupaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu I
ppaṭikku Ivai kuṇ
ṭur cirāmapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇ
ṭur vināyaka paṭṭaṉ E
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
kuṇṭur bhavadroṇa pa
ṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Ivai kuravaceri tevaka
ṉpaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai
kuravaceri tiruppo
ṟṟipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu I
ppaṭikku Ivai kuṇ
ṭur tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku I
vai kuṇṭur gaṇamāpa
va bhaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ippa
ṭikku Ivai Irāyūr ti
ruvaraṅka tevapaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku I
vai centiṟattu dāmo
[tirabhaṭ] ṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭikku Ivai vaṟṟalūr
veṇṇaiya paṭṭaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ku
ṇṭur veṇṇaikūtta paṭṭa
ṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
māṅkaḷur jannaya bhaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Eḻutina
ṉiyokapaṭi §
Digital edition of SII 38.467 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
